name: the-silence
prompt: Two-shot, close framing. Dark-haired man LEFT, brunette woman RIGHT. Close enough to touch, neither reaching. The space between their hands visible. Silence worse than argument. Cool blue room around them. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: wide-impasse
prompt: Wide shot from behind Idris. Man LEFT foreground, woman CENTER. Door visible RIGHT of frame, large and important. Cool blue-white room. The exit waiting. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: sera-explains
prompt: Medium close-up. Brunette woman, voice gentle now. Eyes soft, composure giving way to something sadder. The fight leaving her face. Cool light on her features. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Sera
dialogue.text: I can't stay. Not because I don't love you.

name: her-truth
prompt: Close-up. Brunette woman speaking her truth. Eyes holding his. Warm soft bokeh behind — intimacy in the devastation. | anime manga, cel shading, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Sera
dialogue.text: I was never going to be that person. I thought you knew that.
